title: ColoredArmor
description: Gives you leather color in all colors
body:
The ColoredArmor Plugin offers an exceptional solution for customizing leather armor colors in a multitude of shades. This versatile plugin seamlessly integrates into your gaming experience, allowing you to apply any color you desire to your leather armor sets. With support for various color code formats, this plugin provides effortless customization to meet your personal preferences.

**Features**:

RGB Color Code Support: Effortlessly modify armor colors using the RGB color code system. Simply input the desired red, green, and blue values, and watch your leather armor transform before your eyes.

Hex Color Code Compatibility: For those who prefer hexadecimal color codes, the plugin offers seamless integration. Input your desired hex code to achieve precise and consistent armor color customization.

**Commands**:

/armorcolor <red> <green> <blue> <piece/all>: Apply custom armor colors using the RGB color code format. Specify the red, green, and blue values, along with the target armor piece or apply to all pieces simultaneously.

/armorcolor <hex> <piece/all>: Achieve stunning armor color results by inputting the desired hex color code. Customize a specific armor piece or apply the color to all pieces at once.

**Why choose the ColoredArmor Plugin**:

Unleash Your Creativity: Express yourself and make a unique fashion statement with your leather armor. Stand out in the gaming world by showcasing personalized colors that match your style.

Seamless Integration: The plugin seamlessly integrates into your gameplay, ensuring a user-friendly experience. Effortlessly apply custom colors without any hassle.

Versatility and Precision: Whether you're a fan of RGB or hex color codes, the plugin accommodates both preferences. Achieve precise color customization down to the smallest detail.

Community and Collaboration: Join a community of fellow gamers who appreciate the art of armor customization. Share your color creations, inspire others, and contribute to a vibrant community.
